title: boss.jar
description: This is a mod that was made for an ARG.
body:
ERROR

Note: This mod contains a new dimension, a new music disc, a new item to light the portal to the dimension, 2 new advancements, and a new villager proffesion. The villager's texture is broken, but it does look pretty good with the dimension.
